creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Mon Jan  7 10:33:19 2013
New Revision: 310033
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310033

Log:
  - update to 0.7.8
  - update dependencies list
  - limit to python 2.x only
  
  while here:
  - remove indefinite article from COMMENT
  - tab -> space change in pkg-descr:WWW
  
  PR:		174681
  Submitted by:	Po-Chien Lin <linpc@cs.nctu.edu.tw> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/www/py-djblets/Makefile
  head/www/py-djblets/distinfo
  head/www/py-djblets/pkg-descr
  head/www/py-djblets/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/py-djblets/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-djblets/Makefile	Mon Jan  7 10:27:57 2013	(r310032)
+++ head/www/py-djblets/Makefile	Mon Jan  7 10:33:19 2013	(r310033)
@@ -1,22 +1,26 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	djblets
-PORTVERSION=	0.6.27
+PORTVERSION=	0.7.8
 CATEGORIES=	www python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads.reviewboard.org/releases/Djblets/${PORTVERSION:R}/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 DISTNAME=	Djblets-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	linpc@cs.nctu.edu.tw
-COMMENT=	A collection of useful classes and functions for Django
+COMMENT=	Collection of useful classes and functions for Django
 
 LICENSE=	MIT
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}django==1.3.4<1.4:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-django13 \
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}django>=1.4.2<1.5:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-django \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}django-pipeline>=1.2.16:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-django-pipeline
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}django>=1.4.2<1.5:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-django \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}django-pipeline>=1.2.16:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-django-pipeline \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}feedparser>=5.1.2:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-feedparser \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}imaging>0:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/py-imaging
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}imaging>0:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/py-imaging \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pytz>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-pytz
 
-USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYTHON=	-2.7
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	Djblets

--- head/www/py-djblets/pkg-descr	Mon Jan  7 10:27:57 2013	(r310032)
+++ head/www/py-djblets/pkg-descr	Mon Jan  7 10:33:19 2013	(r310033)
@@ -2,4 +2,4 @@ Djblets is a separate but closely linked
 utility functions and classes for use with Django. We make it a goal to put
 generic code written for Review Board into Djblets for other developers to use.
 
-WWW:	http://www.review-board.org/wiki/Djblets
+WWW: http://www.review-board.org/wiki/Djblets
